name: agentic-maturity-model-skills
description: Coding-agent skills for AMM-style enterprise agent design, implementation, and review. Self-contained.

interface.shortDescription: AMM-style design / implement / review for enterprise agents
interface.longDescription: Five skills routing coding agents through assessing AMM levels, designing enterprise agents, implementing source-aligned AMM pattern entries, and reviewing changes for control activation and evidence — with naming-agnostic recognition of existing systems.
defaultPrompt: What AMM level is this agent at?
Design an enterprise agent for <use case>.
Review this PR for AMM compliance.
